name: Response
summary: Note: Do not Sketchup::Http::Request#cancel the request in the response callback. Response objects allows you to get the response information from the server, you can only receive the Response if you have attached a callback block when calling start from the Request object.

methods.name: body
methods.summary: Gets the HTTP body that was received from the server as a string encoded using the charset provided in the “Content-Type” header of the server response, if no charset is specified, Encoding::ASCII_8BIT will be used.
methods.remarks: Gets the HTTP body that was received from the server as a string encoded using the charset provided in the “Content-Type” header of the server response, if no charset is specified, Encoding::ASCII_8BIT will be used.

methods.name: headers
methods.summary: Returns the HTTP headers that were sent by the server.
methods.remarks: Returns the HTTP headers that were sent by the server.

methods.name: status_code
methods.summary: Returns the HTTP response status code as defined in rfc2616.
methods.remarks: Returns the HTTP response status code as defined in rfc2616.
